text: No person shall display a flashing amber warning light on a vehicle as permitted by this code except when an unusual traffic hazard exists.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 7. Flashing and Colored Lights [25250 - 25282]
##### § 25268

No person shall display a flashing amber warning light on a vehicle as permitted by this code except when an unusual traffic hazard exists.

*(Added by Stats. 1961, Ch. 653.)*

subsections.text: No person shall display a flashing amber warning light on a vehicle as permitted by this code except when an unusual traffic hazard exists.
